Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope
 

  • Uses of GlobalConfiguration in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java that return GlobalConfiguration
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    GlobalConfiguration
    GlobalConfiguration.withCleanStackTrace()
    Indicates that stack trace references to this library should be removed.
    static GlobalConfiguration
    GlobalRequirements.withCleanStackTrace()
    Indicates that exception stack trace references to this library should be removed.
    GlobalConfiguration
    GlobalConfiguration.withDefaultTerminalEncoding()
    Indicates that the terminal encoding should be auto-detected.
    static GlobalConfiguration
    GlobalRequirements.withDefaultTerminalEncoding()
    Indicates that the terminal encoding should be auto-detected.
    GlobalConfiguration
    GlobalConfiguration.withDefaultTerminalWidth()
    Indicates that the terminal width should be auto-detected.
    GlobalConfiguration
    GlobalConfiguration.withDiff()
    Indicates that exceptions should show the difference between the actual and expected values.
    static GlobalConfiguration
    GlobalRequirements.withDiff()
    Indicates that exceptions should show the difference between the actual and expected values.
    GlobalConfiguration
    GlobalConfiguration.withoutCleanStackTrace()
    Indicates that stack trace references to this library should be kept.
    static GlobalConfiguration
    GlobalRequirements.withoutCleanStackTrace()
    Indicates that exception stack trace references to this library should be kept.
    GlobalConfiguration
    GlobalConfiguration.withoutDiff()
    Indicates that exceptions should not show the difference between the actual and expected values.
    static GlobalConfiguration
    GlobalRequirements.withoutDiff()
    Indicates that exceptions should not show the difference between the actual and expected values.
    GlobalConfiguration
    GlobalConfiguration.withTerminalEncoding(TerminalEncoding encoding)
    Indicates the type of encoding that the terminal supports.
    static GlobalConfiguration
    GlobalRequirements.withTerminalEncoding(TerminalEncoding encoding)
    Indicates the type of encoding that the terminal supports.
    GlobalConfiguration
    GlobalConfiguration.withTerminalWidth(int width)
    Indicates the width of the terminal.
